/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/electrical_measurements__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tdp378/DingoQuadruped/build/dingo_peripheral_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
